luminahealth.ai.description: We build a real-time clinical decision support platform that helps emergency physicians identify sepsis and cardiac events faster using multimodal patient data including vitals, lab results, and imaging.
luminahealth.ai.problem_statement: We're processing continuous streams of patient vitals alongside DICOM imaging data and need sub-200ms inference latency at scale. Our current CPU-based pipeline can't keep up with the volume across 12 hospital systems simultaneously. We need GPU-accelerated inference that doesn't require us to rebuild our entire data pipeline.

nvidia.com.description: NVIDIA builds accelerated computing platforms, GPUs, and AI software for the world's most demanding workloads.
nvidia.com.tagline: The engine of the world's AI infrastructure.
nvidia.com.problem_statement: Enabling the next wave of AI, robotics, and accelerated computing across every industry.
